class.name: Necromancer
class.description: Necromancers hold sway overthe forces of life and death, twisting them to serve their ambitions andcommanding small armies of lifeless, animated thralls. They fuel their powerswith their own souls, shaving away parts of their spirit in pursuit of forbiddenknowledge.

starting_equipment.items: 2 Daggers, Arcane Focus (Rod), Robe, Sack, Shovel, Scholar’s Pack, and 13 GP

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You can cast necromantic spells usingIntelligence as your spellcasting ability. You prepare a list of spells from theNecromancer spell list and regain expended spell slots after a Long Rest. Youstart with three cantrips.

class_features.name: Charnel Touch
class_features.description: You have a pool of Charnel Touch points equal to 5 × yourNecromancer level. As a Magic action, you can expend points (up to 5 ×Proficiency Bonus) to make a melee spell attack dealing Necrotic damage equal tothe points spent. You can also use these points to heal Undead under yourcontrol.

class_features.name: Thralls
class_features.description: You can animateUndead thralls (Skeletons, Zombies, etc.) using a 10-minute ritual. Thesethralls are bound to your soul and obey your mental commands. They share oneReaction and Bonus Action per round. Your maximum number of thralls and theircombined CR increase as you level.

class_features.name: Dead Space
class_features.description: You gain an extradimensional space linked to an item (like a bagor cloak) that can hold up to 12 Medium or smaller corpses, bones, or willingUndead creatures.

class_features.name: Necromancer Subclass
class_features.description: You gain a Necromancer subclass of your choice, which grantsfeatures at levels 3, 6, 10, and 20.

class_features.name: Dark Arcana
class_features.description: As a Bonus Action, you can expend a spell slot to replenish yourCharnel Touch pool. The pool regains points equal to your Intelligence modifier+ 1d8 per level of the spell slot.

class_features.name: Ability ScoreImprovement
class_features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat oranother feat of your choice for which you qualify. You gain this feature againat levels 8, 12, and 16.

class_features.name: Animate Dead
class_features.description: You always have the Animate Dead spell prepared. Its castingtime is an action, and you can use it to create Spirits or reanimate anyMedium/Small non-undead corpse using Skeleton, Spirit, or Zombie statistics.

class_features.name: Critical Spellcasting
class_features.description: Enemies suffer aCritical Failure if they roll a 1 on a d20 for a saving throw against yourspells (taking double damage). Your spell attacks score a Critical Hit on a rollof 19 or 20.

class_features.name: Improved Thralls
class_features.description: Yourthralls gain Avoidance (half damage on failed Dex saves, no damage on success),can deal Necrotic damage instead of their normal types, and gain Turn Immunity.

class_features.name: Improved Critical Spellcasting
class_features.description: Critical Failures occur on a roll of 1 or 2 for saves against your spells. Yourspell attacks score a Critical Hit on a roll of 18–20.

class_features.name: Undying Servitude
class_features.description: When a thrall is reduced to 0 HP,you can use a Reaction to drop it to 1 HP instead and heal it for twice yourNecromancer level. Regain use on Long Rest or by expending a level 3+ spellslot.

class_features.name: Epic Boon
class_features.description: You gain an EpicBoon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

class_features.name: Lichdom
class_features.description: You perform the Rite of Lichdomto become an Undead lich. You gain a Spirit Jar (phylactery) for reincarnation,Truesight (120 ft.), and immunity to Necrotic/Poison damage and theExhaustion/Poisoned conditions.

features.name: Blood Ascendant Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Charm Personand Vampiric Touch.

features.name: Charnel Drain
features.description: When you reduce an enemy to 0 HP with Charnel Touch, you regain HP equal toyour Intelligence modifier + Necromancer level.

features.name: Vampiric Transformation
features.description: Expend 15 Charnel Touch points toshape-shift into a bat or a cloud of mist for 1 hour.

features.name: Children of the Night
features.description: Your Animate Thralls ritual can summonWolves, Swarms of Bats, or Swarms of Rats, which count as Undead thralls.

features.name: Nosferatu [Lichdom]
features.description: Your spirit jar is acoffin. You gain 10 HP regeneration per turn, Spider Climb, and doubled movementspeed.

features.name: Combat Research
features.description: Gain proficiency with Martial weapons and allarmor/shields. Use Charnel Touch as a Bonus Action when taking the Attackaction. Add Intelligence to AC while wearing armor.

features.name: Charnel Resilience
features.description: Gain Temporary HP equal to the Necroticdamage dealt by your Charnel Touch.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice per Attack action, and can replace oneattack with a cantrip.

features.name: Overcharged Thralls
features.description: Regain Charnel Touch points equal to your level when a thrall isreduced to 0 HP or released.

features.name: Imperator [Lichdom]
features.description: Gain Resistance to physical damage, a third attack per Attackaction, and your Necrotic damage ignores resistance/immunity.

features.name: Overlord Spells
features.description: You always have specific spells prepared, such as Bane andHaste.

features.name: Charnel Aura
features.description: Bonus Action:Expend Charnel Touch points to create a 30-foot aura that buffs your Undeadthralls' D20 tests, damage, and AC.

features.name: DespoticDiscourse
features.description: Add your Intelligence modifier to Charisma(Deception, Intimidation, and Persuasion) checks.

features.name: Sacrificial Thralls
features.description: Reaction: When hit by an attack, forcethe attack to hit a thrall within 5 feet instead.

features.name: Tyrant [Lichdom]
features.description: You can possess a Humanoid or thrall if youdrop to 0 HP. You can also expend Charnel Touch points to cast Domination spellswithout slots.

features.name: Pale Master Spells
features.description: You always have specific spellsprepared, such as Invisibility and Cloudkill.

features.name: CharnelEmpower
features.description: When dealing damage with a Necromancy spell, expendCharnel Touch points to deal extra Necrotic damage.

features.name: Chilling Disposition
features.description: Gain Intimidation proficiency with anIntelligence bonus. Bonus Action: Expend 10 Charnel Touch points to Frighten acreature.

features.name: Thrall Rush
features.description: OnInitiative, you can empty your Dead Space and all thralls can move up to theirspeed.

features.name: Archlich [LICHDOM]
features.description: GainDevour Soul (regain spell slots on kill), Magic Resistance, and Paralyzing Touch(paralyze on high Charnel Touch damage).

features.name: Pharaoh Spells
features.description: You alwayshave specific spells prepared, such as Bless and Divination.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: Use Channel Divinity (2/rest) forAnkh of Radiance, granting allies resistance and dealing Radiant damage toattackers.

features.name: Mock Divinity
features.description: EnhancedThaumaturgy and the ability to create an illusory Avatar, Gathering Storm, orSun and Moon effects.

features.name: Scarab of Judgement
features.description: Magic Action: Destroy a thrall to heal a willing Humanoid forthe thrall's remaining HP.

features.name: Mummy Lord [Lichdom]
features.description: Your spirit jar is a set of four Canopic Jars. Gain MagicResistance, Mummy Rot (curse on Charnel Touch), and Whirlwind of Sand form.

features.name: Charnel Toxin
features.description: Dealing 5+ damage with Charnel Touch Poisons the target untilyour next turn.

features.name: Necrotoxin
features.description: YourPoison damage and Poisoned condition effects ignore resistance and immunity.

features.name: Vile Congregation
features.description: Enemies within 5 feetof you subtract 1d4 from their D20 tests.

features.name: ProjectileSpew
features.description: Your reach with Charnel Touch and Touch-range spellsincreases by 10 feet.

features.name: Bloated Thralls
features.description: When a thrall dies or is released, it explodes dealing 4d6Poison damage in a 5-foot radius.

features.name: Corpulent Lich[Lichdom]
features.description: Explode on death (Gore Burst) and gain Master ofDisease (enhanced Charnel Touch debuffs like Bleeding or Blinded).

features.name: Skilled Surgeon
features.description: Gain Medicine proficiency with an Intelligence bonus.

features.name: Spell-Stitching
features.description: Expend Charnel Touchpoints to apply permanent magical stitches to thralls (Armored, Fleet, Skilled,Tough, or Vicious).

features.name: Charnel Voltage
features.description: Charnel Touch can deal Lightning damage and arc to a second target within 5feet.

features.name: Lazarus Bolt
features.description: Magic Action:Revive a creature that died within the last minute with 1 HP and Temporary HP.

features.name: Quick Stitch
features.description: Magic Action: Apply atemporary 10-minute Spell-Stitch to a thrall.

features.name: Patchwork Golem [Lichdom]
features.description: Your spirit jar is your golem body.Strength/Dexterity/Constitution become 20, gain physical damage resistance, andapply stitches to yourself.

features.name: Reaper Spells
features.description: You always have specificspells prepared, such as Invisibility and Phantasmal Killer.

features.name: Charnel Veil
features.description: Dealing 5+ damage with Charnel Touchmakes you Invisible until the start of your next turn.

features.name: Umbral Form
features.description: Magic Action: Become a shadow on the floor,gaining immunity to Grappled/Prone, doubled speed, and a climb speed.

features.name: Wraith Flight
features.description: Your thralls gain a Flyspeed equal to their speed and don't provoke Opportunity Attacks while flying.

features.name: Harbinger [Lichdom]
features.description: Charnel Touchhits on 11+ regardless of AC. Gain a 60 ft. Fly speed and animate killedcreatures as Specters (Grim Harvest).
